placement_decision: Add a short lead-in before figures that says the appendix is about how rank evidence is made, not a live model crown.
reader_job: Prepare readers to interpret rankings as sourced slices with caveats.
claim_control: Blocks live-rank and best-model framing before the eye reaches rows.
next_layout_action: Use one paragraph; do not add new rank claims.

placement_decision: Place a compact glossary box before the methodology figure, using vote, config, split, category, rating, confidence interval, publication date, snapshot, and permission gate.
reader_job: Define the vocabulary needed to read A-0014 and A-0013.
claim_control: Keeps caveats in the reading path rather than hiding them after the chart.
next_layout_action: Use shortened definitions, not the full source table.

placement_decision: Place immediately after the glossary and before any ranked rows.
reader_job: Teach votes, filters, uncertainty, dates, snapshots, and permission gates visually.
claim_control: Satisfies the methodology-before-rank rule and prevents rank rows from feeling self-explanatory.
next_layout_action: Use LCAP-001 or LCAP-002 from I-0054.

placement_decision: Use the I-0054 prose transition before the chart: after methodology, the chart can make one narrow point about a tightly clustered historical slice.
reader_job: Move from method to evidence without overselling rank order.
claim_control: States the narrow allowed claim before the sorted visual appears.

placement_decision: Place after A-0014, never before it.
reader_job: Let readers inspect the historical top twelve row order and interval overlap.
claim_control: Allows only the historical `text_style_control` / `latest` / `overall` published-2026-05-19 claim.
next_layout_action: Use LCAP-003 or LCAP-004 from I-0054.

placement_decision: Place directly below A-0013 or in the nearest sidenote, not at the end of the appendix.
reader_job: Keep release-status, non-live-rank, and uncertainty caveats visible while preserving caption economy.
claim_control: Blocks release-status proof, live-rank language, price-quality shortcuts, and task-superiority inference.
next_layout_action: Use one shared footnote; avoid repeating caveats in every caption.

placement_decision: Place after the chart-footnote pair as a compact "what this figure cannot prove" note.
reader_job: Make false readings explicit before the appendix moves to price or benchmark material.
claim_control: Keeps C-0046 active and blocks coding, safety, latency, enterprise, and best-model claims.
next_layout_action: Use only if layout has space; otherwise fold into shared footnote.

placement_decision: If the appendix later moves to prices, insert a hard divider that says the historical rank chart is not a price-quality chart.
reader_job: Prevent readers from mentally joining rank rows to provider prices.
claim_control: Preserves C-0046 until same-scope price/rank joins are chart-ready.
next_layout_action: Add only when the price-quality section is drafted.
